name: Rhubarb and Melon Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the rhubarb into 2 cm (about 1 inch) pieces.
2. Place the chopped rhubarb in a saucepan with sugar and white wine.
3. Cook over low heat until the rhubarb melts, stirring occasionally.
4. Allow the mixture to cool completely.
5. Make melon balls or cut the melon into pieces.
6. Add the melon and chopped mint leaves to the saucepan.
7. Mix well with the cooked rhubarb.
8. Chill for a couple of hours.
9. Serve the salad in small bowls, garnished with fresh mint leaves.
10. Serve alongside lemon sticks.
